title: Marketplace listing image order is reversed?
excerpt:
Why in the world is the marketplace listing image order different in the public marketplace (monday.com/marketplace/[appid]) vs when viewing the listing when signed in (account_slug.monday.com/apps/marketplace/[appid])? 
…

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Why in the world is the marketplace listing image order different in the public marketplace (monday.com/marketplace/[appid]) vs when viewing the listing when signed in (account_slug.monday.com/apps/marketplace/[appid])?

In the public marketplace listing the images show in the order they were submitted through the listing request feature. When you’re signed in they show in reverse, showing the last image first.

The first image was submitted as the first image for a reason.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @reinier,

Would you be able to please fill this form so that our team can take a look into this?
